title: lepidium johnstonii
intro: Lepidium johnstonii, also known as desert cress or wild peppergrass, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lepidium johnstonii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Lepidium johnstonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
